name: Fire Emblem
original_name: ファイアーエムブレム 紋章の謎
overview: Forced into exile by the sudden betrayal of an ally, Prince Marth leads a retinue of loyal knights across the continent, targeting enemy factions and gathering powerful new allies on the way to reclaiming their kingdom.
